title: 151 Stain & Damp Block Spray, White Satin Finish, Blocks Damp, Prevents Stains, Mould, and Mildew, Easy-to-Apply Waterproof Protective Coating for Interior Use,400ml
features: DAMP & STAIN BLOCKING FORMULA: Experience powerful protection against moisture and stains with 151 Stain & Damp Block Spray. Its advanced formulation penetrates deep into surfaces to seal and block damp patches, water stains, and discoloration caused by mould or condensation. Ideal for both quick repairs and long-term prevention, it keeps your walls and ceilings looking clean and fresh.

CREATES A DURABLE WATERPROOF BARRIER: Formulated with high-performance waterproofing technology, this spray creates a moisture-resistant barrier that prevents damp from resurfacing. Once applied, it forms a protective seal that locks out water, humidity, and steam, ensuring your walls remain dry and protected even in areas prone to condensation or minor leaks.

SMOOTH WHITE SATIN FINISH: Crafted for a smooth, professional-quality finish, this spray dries to a clean white satin surface that complements any interior style. The refined texture blends seamlessly with your existing décor, providing a flawless, uniform appearance. Once fully dry, it can be painted or wallpapered over effortlessly, making it ideal for both quick touch-ups and full-scale redecorating projects.

EASY AEROSOL APPLICATION: No brushes or rollers required — just spray and seal! The convenient aerosol design ensures smooth, even application across both large surfaces and tricky corners, delivering precise coverage without drips or streaks. Perfect for walls, ceilings, and tight spaces, it allows for fast, mess-free application with professional results every time

VERSATILE USE ON MULTIPLE SURFACES: Perfect for use on plaster, brick, cement, concrete, and painted surfaces, the 151 Stain & Damp Block Spray is an essential tool for DIYers and homeowners alike. Whether tackling damp patches around windows, ceilings, or bathrooms, it provides effective, lasting protection for every room in your home.
